message:
feat(util): Add BEADS_CACHE_DIR for monorepo transient file support

Addresses issue #30 - monorepo support for transient cache files.

BEADS_DIR was already implemented to specify the .beads directory location.
This adds BEADS_CACHE_DIR to allow separating transient files (like
`last-touched`) from the main .beads directory. Useful when:

- .beads is checked into version control
- Transient cache files should be stored elsewhere (e.g., /tmp, ~/.cache)
- Multiple worktrees share the same .beads but need separate caches

Priority: BEADS_CACHE_DIR > beads_dir (fallback to beads_dir if unset)

Changes:
- Add BEADS_CACHE_DIR_ENV constant
- Add resolve_cache_dir() function to determine effective cache path
- Update last_touched_path() to use cache directory
- Update set_last_touched_id() to create cache dir if needed
- Add tests for new functionality

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
